0.q: When the CvNHA1 gene was expressed in this yeast strain, it exhibited partial complementation of these phenotypes... this complementation was dependent on the pH of the culture medium, suggesting that the CvNHA1 gene encodes an Na+/H+ antiporter protein.

1.q: When CvGPD1 was expressed in recipient cells by induction of transcription by addition of galactose... recovery of glycerol synthesis were conﬁrmed.

2.q: When CvNHA1 was expressed in salt-sensitive Saccharomyces cerevisiae cells, increased salt-tolerance was observed, indicating that Cvnha1p possesses an Na+/H+ antiporter function... Cvnha1p participates in the extrusion of intracellular Na+

3.q: When CvGPD1 was expressed in glycerol synthesis-deﬁcient Saccharomyces cerevisiae cells... NADP+-dependent GPDH, Cvgpd1p synthesis and recovery of glycerol synthesis were conﬁrmed.
